description.ko: 첨단 기술의 혁신과 지하 세계의 거친 느낌이 공존하는 거대 미래 도시로, 영원한 네온사인과 디지털 비의 차가운 빛으로 가득한 풍경입니다.
description.en: A sprawling futuristic metropolis where high-tech innovation meets underground grit, illuminated by the cold glow of perpetual neon and digital rain.

prompt: Cinematic cyberpunk cityscape at night, rainy asphalt reflecting vibrant pink and cyan neon signs, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, flying vehicles weaving through dense urban canyons, futuristic architecture, hyper-detailed textures, volumetric lighting, moody atmosphere, 8k resolution, synthwave aesthetic.
